analysis: The project appears to be a static website with multiple versions (test-website, github-page, docs) and a React-based client directory. The event.json specifies a theme focused on black holes with animated objects, slides, and pages. The existing to-dos indicate ongoing work on CSS animations, mobile navigation, and JavaScript functionality. The constraints limit modifications to UI-related files only.

improvements.description: Add cosmic-themed CSS animations for black hole visuals, including swirling effects, gravitational lensing, and glowing accretion disks. Implement smooth transitions for animated slides and interactive elements.
Enhance the HTML structure to include sections for black hole facts, interactive animations, and a dedicated animated slide area with navigation controls.
Implement JavaScript functions to control animated slides, handle user interactions with black hole animations, and ensure smooth transitions between different sections of the page.
Apply the same cosmic theme and animations to the GitHub Pages version, ensuring consistency across different deployments.
Update the documentation site with the black hole theme, including animated elements and a cohesive dark cosmic design.
